case_title: ACA RECEIVABLES CO., LLC VS. PAUL C LAXTON et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-23-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-23-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDERED ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 514 FOR TRIAL BY COURT. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. TESTIMONY OF THE WITNESS STRIKEN. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT TO RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-02-2005 IN DEPT. 514. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: K. FARNSWORTH CSR 5162
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACA RECEIVABLES CO., LLC SERVED JAN-03-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAXTON, PAUL C
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAXTON, PAUL C
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LAXTON, PAUL C

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACA RECEIVABLES CO., LLC TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT LAXTON, PAUL C DEFENDANT IS PREVAILING PARTY AND IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER SUCH COSTS AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE FIXED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
